files.source_commit_subject: fix: AlterStatus 加 User-Agent（藍新 WAF 擋無 UA 請求回 403）
files.runtime_role: PAY-PLANS-500 hotfix: lazily imported inside app.py's _newebpay() (app.py:16228), only on first NewebPay payment-route access -- app.py itself starts fine without it, but GET /api/pay/plans and every /api/pay/newebpay/* route raised an unhandled ModuleNotFoundError/500 without it. Restored byte-identical to the last commit that touched it on any branch; verified against every current-master call site (build_period_form, decrypt_period_response, alter_period_status, is_configured, IS_TEST) before restoring.
files.production_hash_status: not applicable -- this file was absent from the running Production container's filesystem entirely prior to this Sprint (confirmed via `docker exec ... find / -iname newebpay*`), so there is no Production copy to hash-compare against
files.source_status: local Git provenance -- not previously pushed to canonical origin

files.source_commit_subject: feat: PayPal Subscriptions 訂閱（US$10/月、US$84/年，Sandbox 先行）
files.runtime_role: PAY-PLANS-500 hotfix: lazily imported inside app.py's _paypal() (app.py:16872), only on first PayPal payment-route access -- app.py itself starts fine without it, but GET /api/pay/plans and every /api/pay/paypal/* route raised an unhandled ModuleNotFoundError/500 without it. Restored byte-identical to the last (and only) commit that touched it on any branch; verified against every current-master call site (is_configured, IS_TEST, create_product, create_plan, create_subscription, get_subscription, cancel_subscription) before restoring.
